targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2), 0) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='income'
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)), 2), 0) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='income'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1), 0) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN ('income', 'expense')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1), 0) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN ('income', 'expense')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Essential'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Essential'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Discretionary'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense' AND category_group='Discretionary'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type='expense'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY category_group ORDER BY total DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') GROUP BY category_group ORDER BY total DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT t.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE(b.monthly_limit, 0) as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used, COUNT(1) as count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY t.category ORDER BY spent DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT t.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE(b.monthly_limit, 0) as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used, COUNT(1) as count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY t.category ORDER BY spent DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') GROUP BY month, category_group ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') GROUP BY month, category_group ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income', 'expense') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base, amount) ELSE 0 END), 2) as income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount)) ELSE 0 END), 2) as expenses FROM transactions WHERE tx_type IN ('income', 'expense') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date, description, amount, currency, ROUND(COALESCE(amount_base, amount), 2) as amount_base, tx_type, category_group, category FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN (${tx_type:sqlstring}) AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) AND category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200
targets.queryText: SELECT date, description, amount, currency, ROUND(COALESCE(amount_base, amount), 2) as amount_base, tx_type, category_group, category FROM transactions WHERE date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND tx_type IN (${tx_type:sqlstring}) AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) AND category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200

options.content:
### Sub-Dashboards

Use the **Finance Dashboards** dropdown at the top to navigate:

- **Budgeting** — Budget usage, 12-month comparison, month-over-month changes
- **Savings** — Savings rate trend, projections, cumulative growth
- **Investments** — Holdings, currency, projected growth
- **FIRE Tracker** — Progress gauge, milestones, timeline

---

### Vaultkeeper Commands

**Budget check:**
> "How am I doing on budget this cycle?"

**Reclassify:**
> "Reclassify all Zabka transactions to Groceries/Essential"

**Show unknowns:**
> "Show me unclassified transactions"

**Monthly report:**
> "Generate report for cycle 2026-02"

**Set budget:**
> "Set Dining budget to 500 PLN"

---
*Talk to Vaultkeeper in Matrix to manage finances.*

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'Total Transactions' as metric, CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) as value FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified (Other)', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE category = 'Other' AND tx_type = 'expense' UNION ALL SELECT 'Unknown tx_type', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE tx_type = 'unknown' UNION ALL SELECT 'Missing amount_base', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE amount_base IS NULL AND currency != 'PLN' UNION ALL SELECT 'Date Range', MIN(date) || ' to ' || MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Last Transaction', MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Exchange Rate Months', CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS TEXT) FROM exchange_rates UNION ALL SELECT 'Budget Targets', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM budget_targets UNION ALL SELECT 'Holdings Tracked', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM holdings
targets.queryText: SELECT 'Total Transactions' as metric, CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) as value FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified (Other)', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE category = 'Other' AND tx_type = 'expense' UNION ALL SELECT 'Unknown tx_type', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE tx_type = 'unknown' UNION ALL SELECT 'Missing amount_base', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM transactions WHERE amount_base IS NULL AND currency != 'PLN' UNION ALL SELECT 'Date Range', MIN(date) || ' to ' || MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Last Transaction', MAX(date) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'Exchange Rate Months', CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS TEXT) FROM exchange_rates UNION ALL SELECT 'Budget Targets', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM budget_targets UNION ALL SELECT 'Holdings Tracked', CAST(COUNT(1) AS TEXT) FROM holdings
